seo.title: AI Brand Promotion - QR Code Marketing & Analytics
seo.description: Create and manage brand promotion plans with AiBrand. Use AI to batch generate promotional videos and images, share QR codes for customer-driven content publishing, and track real-time performance data including views, likes, comments and shares. Generate AI art QR codes, manage drafts, and monitor promotion results — all in one powerful dashboard.
seo.keywords: brand promotion, AI promotional content, promotion plan management, QR code marketing, AI video generation, promotional materials, social media promotion, content publishing, marketing analytics, AI marketing tools, brand awareness, local business promotion, AiBrand

empty.title: No Promotion Plans Yet
empty.description: Create your first promotion plan to start brand promotion

plan.title: Promotion Plan
plan.emptyDesc: Create your first promotion plan to start brand promotion
plan.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

detail.title: Plan Details
detail.description: View and manage your promotion plan
detail.generatingDraft: Your promotional content is being generated
detail.batchGenerateDesc: Select the number of drafts to generate (1-10)
detail.agentGeneratePrompt: Generate 10 video drafts for my restaurant
detail.promptPlaceholder: Specify extra requirements for draft generation, e.g.: the generated drafts should capture the bustling atmosphere during peak dining hours, with every seat taken
detail.storeNotActive: Store is initializing, please try again later
detail.storeNotLinked: No store linked. Please link a store first to use AI batch generation.
detail.insufficientBalance: This generation requires {{total}} credits, but you only have {{balance}} credits. Please top up and try again.
detail.promptPlaceholderWithStore: Create a dining check-in video for {{storeName}}
detail.videoHintJimeng: (The system will automatically adjust the draft generation style based on your uploaded video)
detail.videoHintGrok: (The system will generate new video based on your uploaded video)
detail.videoNotSupported: Video upload is not supported in image mode
detail.videoDurationExceeded: Total video duration cannot exceed {{max}} seconds
detail.videoLoadFailed: Failed to load video file, please try again
detail.defaultPrompt: Create a vlogger content for this {{name}} located at {{position}}, featuring a professional exploring and checking-in experience
detail.defaultPromptNoPosition: Create a vlogger content for this {{name}}, featuring a professional exploring and checking-in experience
detail.promptRequired: Please enter a prompt before generating
detail.noPlatformSelected: No target platform selected, no parameter limits applied.
detail.limitsMinTip: Shows the minimum value across all selected platforms.

platformIncompatible.contentTypeNotSupported: This platform does not support the current content type
platformIncompatible.imageCountExceeded: Image count exceeds the platform limit (max {{max}})

detail.timeLimitedModelTip: Time-limited models are not guaranteed to be available. If unavailable, please try again later or switch to another model.

overview.qrcodeHint: Share this QR code with customers to let them scan and publish your drafts to promote your store
overview.noDraftQrcodeHint: You need at least one draft to use the QR code for promotion!

qrcode.description: Scan QR code or copy link to share with customers
qrcode.promptPlaceholder: Describe your desired QR code style, e.g.: watercolor, cyberpunk...

publishRecord.title: Publish Records
publishRecord.emptyDesc: Share promotion QR code with customers, records will appear here

material.emptyDesc: Create materials or use Agent to batch generate

common.dataUpdateHint: Data is not real-time and updates daily at 2 AM

draftManage.setConditionHint: Please set at least one filter condition

createMaterial.title: Create Material
createMaterial.instagramImageAspectRatio: Instagram image aspect ratio must be between 4:5 and 1.91:1
createMaterial.instagramVideoAspectRatio: Instagram video aspect ratio must be between 9:16 and 4:5
createMaterial.facebookImageAspectRatio: Facebook image aspect ratio must be between 4:5 and 1.91:1
createMaterial.facebookVideoAspectRatio: Facebook video aspect ratio must be between 9:16 and 4:5
